mapper.insert: INSERT INTO milestone ( milestone_id, title, description, manager_id, status_code, status_name, start_date, end_date, create_at ) VALUES ( MILESTONE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || LPAD(SEQ_MILESTONE.NEXTVAL, 4, '0'), #{title}, #{description}, #{statusCode}, #{statusName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, SYSDATE )
